pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8, preventing the use of Java 21 language features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities with libraries requiring newer bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava (e.g., 23.0) may contain classes or bytecode incompatible with Java 21, leading to runtime errors or compilation failures when used with newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin (e.g., 3.7.0) do not support compiling code for Java 21, resulting in build failures.
